components.name: Primary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #c5a880; color: #150d0b; padding: 14px 32px; border-radius: 9999px; border: 1px solid #c5a880; font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: transparent; color: #c5a880; transform: scale(1.03); }

narrative.overview: The Tactile Alchemist design system focuses on the visualization of texture, high-performance protective quality, and uncompromised surface luxury. The aesthetic philosophy is rooted in a rich, warm dark atmosphere where tactile depth and finish details take center stage.
keyCharacteristics: Deep, warm-toned dark backgrounds transitioning smoothly to evoke luxury.
Precise, high-contrast typography pairing geometric and serif families.
Intentional, rare usage of burnished gold accents to guide visual hierarchy.

rules.name: The Rarity Rule
rules.body: The Burnished Gold accent is reserved for key touchpoints only. If everything is highlighted, nothing is.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Subtle borders and outline indicators represent active elements.

dos: Do maintain a strict contrast ratio (≥4.5:1) for all body copy.
Do stagger animations with individual delays for a premium entrance.
Do center portfolio headings and include the standard gold divider line.
donts: Don't use border-left greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe on cards or alerts.
Don't hide critical details behind hover opacity.
